stickyStabilization: Older desktop fixed ownership and newer sticky layout-bound ownership were fighting in the cascade.
Desktop rail now uses one sticky model inside the sidebar column, while narrow layouts keep the explicit overlay path only in the mobile media query.
Internal sticky head/footer behavior remained intact.
inlineMetaRow: Author and relative timestamp now share one inline row where width allows.
Author remains primary; timestamp is quieter and secondary.
Wrapping remains allowed as a safe fallback.
utilityMenuSizing: Utility menu width was increased slightly so Copy link and Delete comment stay on one line.
Menu buttons remain compact and calm rather than dialog-like.
popoverCollision: Runtime now measures available space inside the comments panel and flips the utility menu downward when the sticky header would clip upward placement.
nestedIndent: Nested replies use slightly less horizontal space and a softer thread rail.
tinyJsHooksAdded: Menu placement measurement with data-gg-placement=up/down for the comment utility popover.

acceptedNativeBloggerLimitations: The rail remains a visual/runtime enhancement over Blogger-native comments markup.
Open-comment compose fixtures remain unset, so compose-lane proof is explicit skip.
Native Blogger iframe internals remain treated as cross-origin UI; only the host shell, dock, and runtime-owned rail behavior were refined.
